# Generated protocol bindings

`Provider.ts`, `AgentEvent.ts`, `ServerFrame.ts`, and `SessionRequest.ts` are
**generated by `ts-rs`** from the Rust types in `core/src/event.rs` and
`core/src/protocol.rs`. Do not edit them by hand — run `cargo test` from the repo
root to regenerate. They are committed so the UI typechecks and builds without
running cargo, and so protocol changes show up in diffs.

`index.ts` is the only hand-written file here: it re-exports the generated types
and defines `InboundFrame = AgentEvent | ServerFrame` (the two enums share the
on-wire `type` discriminant namespace but are owned by different layers).
